common.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete?
common.confirmAction: Are you sure you want to proceed?

footer.copyright: © 2025 Hagicode Desktop. Built with ❤️ using Electron + React + TypeScript.

webView.serviceNotRunningDesc: Please start the web service before accessing the web interface.

mirror.title: NPM Mirror Configuration
mirror.info: NPM tools will automatically use this mirror for faster downloads

navigation.officialWebsiteDesc: Visit Hagicode official website for latest news and documentation
navigation.techSupportDesc: Join our QQ group for technical support (Group: 610394020)
navigation.discordDesc: Join the official HagiCode Discord community
navigation.githubProjectDesc: View source code and star us on GitHub

dialog.title: AI diagnosis guidance
dialog.description: Desktop resolves the diagnosis prompt and lets you run it in whichever AI CLI you prefer.
dialog.panelDescription: Copy the prompt, run it from the suggested location, and return once you have next steps.

logQuickAccess.title: Log Quick Access
logQuickAccess.description: Open the Desktop and Web App log folders directly to shorten diagnostics time.
logQuickAccess.hint: Button states refresh automatically with the active version

desktop.label: Desktop Logs Folder
desktop.description: Open the current Desktop logs directory on this device.

webApp.label: Web App Logs Folder
webApp.description: Open the Web App logs directory for the active version.

errors.load_failed: Failed to load log folder status

noVersionInstalled.title: No Versions Installed Yet
noVersionInstalled.description: The easiest way to get started with Hagicode Desktop is through our guided setup wizard. Complete installation and configuration in just a few steps.

descriptions.checking: Checking the active package source for a compatible newer version.
descriptions.downloading: A newer version was found and the archive is being predownloaded in the background.
descriptions.ready: The latest archive is verified and ready for the existing version-management install flow.
descriptions.settings-disabled: Background predownloads are disabled. You can turn them back on in Settings.
descriptions.portable-mode: Portable mode skips background updates and keeps the current runtime read-only.
descriptions.no-package-source: No active package source is configured, so background updates cannot start.

hero.title: Welcome to the homepage
hero.description: This top section summarizes service health and helps you understand where to start on the Desktop dashboard.

diagnosis.title: Open AI diagnosis guidance
diagnosis.description: Use this shortcut when you need structured troubleshooting guidance before changing service or package settings.

updateReminder.title: Track available updates
updateReminder.description: When a compatible newer package is discovered, this reminder card shows its state and links to the next action.

serviceCard.title: Monitor service status
serviceCard.description: Review the embedded service state here, then start, stop, restart, or open Hagicode when the runtime is ready.

logAccess.title: Jump to log folders
logAccess.description: These quick actions open Desktop and Web App log folders so you can collect evidence faster during diagnostics.

activeVersion.title: Review the active version
activeVersion.description: This section shows which package is installed right now and gives you a quick route into version management.

noVersionInstalled.title: Install your first version
noVersionInstalled.description: When no package is installed yet, use this call to action to launch the setup wizard and complete the first runtime install.
